post.description: Creates a new contact. First name and last name are required. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this contact. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/contacts/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

post.description: Creates many contacts in a single request. Each contact requires first name and last name. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this contact. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/contacts/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates many contacts in a single request. Each contact requires an ID. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this contact. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/contacts/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes many contacts by their IDs in a single request. This operation cannot be undone.

post.description: Retrieves a list of contacts with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this contact. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/contacts/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

get.description: Retrieves configuration for contacts API, including available custom columns, filterable fields, and sortable fields.

200.description: The contacts configuration was retrieved successfully.

get.description: Retrieves a single contact by its unique identifier.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this contact. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/contacts/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates an existing contact. Only provided fields are updated. Set fields to null to clear them.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this contact. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/contacts/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes a contact from the database.

post.description: Creates a new organization. Name is required. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this organization. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/organizations/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

post.description: Creates many organizations in a single request. Each organization requires a name. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this organization. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/organizations/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates many organizations in a single request. Each organization requires an ID. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this organization. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/organizations/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes many organizations by their IDs in a single request. This operation cannot be undone.

post.description: Retrieves a list of organizations with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this organization. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/organizations/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

get.description: Retrieves configuration for organizations API, including available custom columns, filterable fields, and sortable fields.

200.description: The organizations configuration was retrieved successfully.

get.description: Retrieves a single organization by its unique identifier.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this organization. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/organizations/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates an existing organization. Only provided fields are updated. Set fields to null to clear them.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this organization. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/organizations/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes an organization from the database.

post.description: Creates a new deal. Name is required. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this deal. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/deals/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

post.description: Creates many deals in a single request. Each deal requires a name. All other fields are optional. Deals can include services with quantities using the services array.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this deal. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/deals/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates many deals in a single request. Each deal requires an ID. All other fields are optional. You can update services by providing a services array with serviceId and quantity.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this deal. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/deals/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes many deals by their IDs in a single request. This operation cannot be undone.

post.description: Retrieves a list of deals with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this deal. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/deals/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

get.description: Retrieves configuration for deals API, including available custom columns, filterable fields, and sortable fields.

200.description: The deals configuration was retrieved successfully.

get.description: Retrieves a single deal by its unique identifier.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this deal. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/deals/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates an existing deal. Only provided fields are updated. Set fields to null to clear them.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this deal. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/deals/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes a deal from the database.

post.description: Creates a new service. Name and amount are required. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this service. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/services/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

post.description: Creates many services in a single request. Each service requires a name and an amount (must be greater than 0). All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this service. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/services/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

put.description: Updates many services in a single request. Each service requires an ID. All other fields are optional.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this service. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/services/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes many services by their IDs in a single request. This operation cannot be undone.

put.description: Updates an existing service. Only provided fields are updated. Set fields to null to clear them.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values for this service. Query available custom field configurations via GET /v1/services/configuration, which returns customColumns with their definitions.

delete.description: Deletes a service from the database.
